description: 把 image 和 detections 或 roi-list.v1 裁成 image-refs.v1 图片集合。常见接法：原图接 image，检测结果接 detections，或 ROI Grid Create.rois 接 rois，输出 crops 可继续接 Gallery Preview.images、Get Image Ref.images 或 QR Crop Decode Remap.crops。

description.zh-CN: 把 image 和 detections 或 roi-list.v1 裁成 image-refs.v1 图片集合。常见接法：原图接 image，检测结果接 detections，或 ROI Grid Create.rois 接 rois，输出 crops 可继续接 Gallery Preview.images、Get Image Ref.images 或 QR Crop Decode Remap.crops。
description.en-US: Crop the source image with detection boxes or roi-list.v1 and output an image-refs.v1 collection. Typical wiring: source image -> image, detections -> detections, or ROI Grid Create.rois -> rois, then connect crops to Gallery Preview.images, Get Image Ref.images, or QR Crop Decode Remap.crops.
Source image used for crop extraction.

input_ports.name: detections
input_ports.description: 用于裁剪的 detections.v1 检测框集合。

description.zh-CN: 用于裁剪的 detections.v1 检测框集合。
description.en-US: detections.v1 payload that provides the crop boxes.

input_ports.name: rois
input_ports.description: 用于批量裁剪的 roi-list.v1；接入后优先使用 rois，未接入时使用 detections。

description.zh-CN: 用于批量裁剪的 roi-list.v1；接入后优先使用 rois，未接入时使用 detections。
description.en-US: roi-list.v1 used for batch crop extraction. If connected, rois take priority over detections.

output_ports.name: crops
output_ports.description: 裁剪完成后的 image-refs.v1 图片集合。

description.zh-CN: 裁剪完成后的 image-refs.v1 图片集合。
description.en-US: image-refs.v1 collection that contains the exported crops.

box_padding.title: Box padding
box_padding.description: Expand every detection box by this many pixels before cropping.

description.zh-CN: 裁剪前向四周额外扩展的像素数。
description.en-US: Number of pixels added around each detection box before cropping.

max_crops.title: Max crops
max_crops.description: Maximum number of crops to export. Leave empty to export all detections.

description.zh-CN: 最多导出多少张裁剪图；留空时导出全部检测结果。
description.en-US: Maximum number of crops to export. Leave blank to export every detection.

output_dir.title: Output directory
output_dir.description: Optional storage directory for exported crops. Leave empty to return memory image refs.

description.zh-CN: 可选输出目录；留空时返回 memory image-ref。
description.en-US: Optional storage directory for exported crops. Leave blank to return memory image refs.

polygon_background_fill.title: Polygon background fill
polygon_background_fill.description: Background fill used outside polygon ROI when exporting polygon crops.

description.zh-CN: 按多边形 ROI 导出裁剪图时，多边形外部区域的填充颜色。
description.en-US: Background color used outside a polygon ROI when exporting polygon crops.
